theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose how the application looks without changing your data, workflow, or layout.

light.title: Light
light.description: Keeps the current appearance exactly as the default experience.

dark.title: Dark
dark.description: Adds a low-glare workspace across pages, tables, forms, and charts.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the entire system

zoom.title: Magnification
zoom.description: Increase visual size for better readability
zoom.footer: Starts at 90%. Use Ctrl +/- or the buttons to adjust.

about.description: Fawtrtak™ is a financial management platform built for accurate invoicing, reporting, and regulatory compliance.

annotations.dashboard: Allows the user to view the main dashboard, including statistics, charts, and overall system summaries.
annotations.reports: Allows the user to view, print and generate system reports such as sales, refunds, and analytics.
annotations.einvoicing: Allows the user to share invoices with the ISTD platform (Fawtara), including invoices, refunds, and monitoring the E-Invoicing process.

EventsScreen.title: Events
EventsScreen.subtitle: Create, review, print, and track event balances and payments from one place.

empty.title: No events found
empty.description: Create your first event to start tracking bookings, balances, and related payments.
empty.filtered_description: Try another status filter to view a different set of events.

form.create_subtitle: Capture the event details and the initial financial information.
form.initial_payment_method_hint: Choose how the initial payment was received.

sections.event_details_hint: Basic operational information for the event.
sections.financial_details_hint: Define the event value and any initial payment received.

payment_modal.subtitle: Record a payment for {{eventName}}.
payment_modal.method_hint: Choose the payment method used for this event payment.

amount_modal.subtitle: Update the total amount for {{eventName}}.
amount_modal.minimum_hint: The total amount cannot be less than the amount already paid: {{amount}} JOD.

summary.financial_rule_value: Each payment creates a linked event invoice for proper tracking.

details.subtitle: Review operational details, balances, and payment activity.
details.status_hint: Mark the event as open or ended whenever its operational state changes.
details.invoice_pattern_value: Payments are linked to event invoices automatically.
details.payment_history_hint: All saved event payments are listed below.

filters.title: Status Filter
filters.hint: Filter the event list by operational status.

messages.update_amount_failed: Failed to update event total amount
messages.payment_saved_success: Event payment saved and invoice created successfully.

print.no_payments: No payments recorded for this event.

no_access.message: You do not have permission to view events.
